summary: G002 autosave recovery implementation preserves failed draft autosave bodies in package+draft scoped localStorage, restores them after reload/relogin, resends through the existing autosave PATCH path, clears recovery only after successful persistence or same-body persisted evidence, and blocks draft-replacing actions while recovery is pending.

verification.evidence: Biome reported OK after the final G002 edits.
Vitest reported 1 test file passed, 31 tests passed.
Full suite reported 10 test files passed, 123 tests passed after final restore-original guard.

contractCoverage.evidence: Autosave failure writes createDraftRecoveryRecord to localStorage before returning or redirecting on 401.
Load effect restores scoped differing local recovery into draftBody; autosave effect PATCHes body_markdown: draftBody.
clearDraftRecovery occurs after awaited PATCH success or when loaded server body already equals the recovery body.
Generate package, search structure, apply fixes, and restore original all call blockDraftReplacementWhileRecovering while recoveryAvailable is true.
